description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on release creation. Run a build job in parallel on ubuntu-latest and macos-latest with Python 3.6, 3.7, and 3.8, checking out the code, setting up Python, installing test environment dependencies, and running tox. Then, run a deploy job on ubuntu-latest, checking out the code, setting up Python 3.8, installing publish environment dependencies, and building and publishing to PyPI using twine with credentials from secrets.
